title: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
summary_full: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
summary_public: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
